title: Ornith (35B,9B) + Hermes,Zed: THE FULLY PRIVATE LOCAL AGENT is ACTUALLY HERE!
summary: Ornith is a new family of open-source agentic coding models from DeepReinforce, ranging from 9B to 397B parameters and built on Gemma and Qwen. The models are designed for coding, tool use, and agentic workflows, with MIT licensing and GGUF format support for local deployment. The 35B and 9B variants are highlighted as practical for local and server use.
writeup: The video covers Ornith, an open-source family of agentic coding models from DeepReinforce that ranges from 9B to 397B parameters and is built on Gemma and Qwen. The models target code generation, tool use, and agentic workflows, ship under MIT licensing, and support GGUF format for local deployment, with the 35B and 9B variants singled out as practical for local and server use. The framing is a fully private local agent setup, paired with Hermes and Zed.
